mapper.select:
SELECT r.share_user_id AS collectorId, u.username AS collectorName, COUNT(r.id) AS submitCount FROM registration_record r LEFT JOIN collection_info c ON r.collection_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.share_user_id = u.id WHERE c.enterprise_code = #{enterpriseCode} AND r.submit_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND r.submit_time <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{collectorName}, '%') GROUP BY r.share_user_id, u.username ORDER BY submitCount DESC
